modeValues.settingInterpretation: Items alternate between output lanes automatically. Output toggles between 0 and 1 after each item.
Uses sorter motherboard/computer filtering. Whitelisted and rejected items go to different lanes.
IC10 or logic must set Output to 0 or 1 for each item. Output resets to -1 after release.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Sets routing mode. See modeValues for Split, Filter, and Logic behavior.

parameters.name: Lock
parameters.description: Locks the device for player interaction when set to 1. Unlocks it when set to 0.

parameters.name: On
parameters.description: Turns the sorter on when set >= 1. Turns it off when set < 1.

parameters.name: ClearMemory
parameters.description: Resets ImportCount and ExportCount to zero.

parameters.name: Output
parameters.description: In Logic mode, set 0 or 1 to release the next item to that lane. The sorter resets this to -1 after the item exits.

outputs.name: Power
outputs.description: Returns whether the sorter is powered and turned on.

outputs.name: Mode
outputs.description: Returns the current routing mode. See modeValues.

outputs.name: Error
outputs.description: Returns whether the sorter is reporting an error.

outputs.name: Lock
outputs.description: Returns whether the sorter is locked.

outputs.name: On
outputs.description: Returns whether the sorter is turned on.

outputs.name: RequiredPower
outputs.description: Returns the current amount of power required by the sorter in watts.

outputs.name: ExportCount
outputs.description: Incremented each time an item stack exits by either export slot.

outputs.name: ImportCount
outputs.description: Incremented each time an item stack enters by the import slot.

outputs.name: Output
outputs.description: Returns the current lane selection. In Logic mode the idle value is typically -1 until the next item is routed.

outputs.name: NameHash
outputs.description: Returns the hash of the device's in-game custom name.
